title: Ceasefire Announced, But It's Not A Full Stop To War: What Happens Next
summary_full: The immediate test for this ceasefire is the next 24 hours; if Iran, the US, and Israel can control their trigger fingers, the Islamabad talks (or whenever the first round takes place) will begin on a positive note.
